response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience and leadership roles, including people management and team leadership, though his experience in developer tools and build systems is less explicit. His background in mobile development (Apple TV/iOS apps) and testing infrastructure (refactoring dojos, code review practices) partially aligns with the role. However, his current focus on AI-agent infrastructure and lack of direct mobile-platform development experience may limit his fit.
strengths: Strong technical leadership and hands-on coding experience across multiple languages and domains (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, mobile apps, developer tools).
Demonstrated ability to lead organizational change and mentor teams (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course creation).
Proven experience in testing infrastructure and code quality practices (TDD, CI/CD, code reviews).
concerns: Limited explicit experience in developer tools, build systems, or testing infrastructure for large-scale mobile platforms.
No clear evidence of strategic roadmap planning or leadership in organizational change for developer productivity tools.
Current role (Stripe) focuses on AI-agent infrastructure rather than developer tools or mobile platforms.
